languages.text: {n}Некрон выставляет перед собой руку с зажатым в ней посохом — скорее предупреждающе, чем угрожающе.{/n} "Посетитель, ты выходец из низшей расы. Как Смотритель я обязан преграждать путь всем, кто способен повредить экспонаты".

{n}The Necron holds out a hand with a staff clutched in it in front of him, more warning than threatening.{/n} "Visitor, you are of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to bar entry to any who might damage the exhibits."
languages.original_text: {n}Некрон выставляет перед собой руку с зажатым в ней посохом — скорее предупреждающе, чем угрожающе.{/n} "Посетитель, ты выходец из низшей расы. Как Смотритель я обязан преграждать путь всем, кто способен повредить экспонаты".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Necron holds out a hand with a staff clutched in it in front of him, more warning than threatening.{/n} "Visitor, you are of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to bar entry to any who might damage the exhibits."

{n}The Necron holds out a hand with a staff clutched in it in front of him, more warning than threatening.{/n} "Visitor, you are of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to bar entry to any who might damage the exhibits."

{n}The Necron holds out a hand with a staff clutched in it in front of him, more warning than threatening.{/n} "Visitor, you are of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to bar entry to any who might damage the exhibits."

languages.text: {n}ネクロンの前に杖を握った手は、脅威よりも警告を表している。{/n} 「訪問者、あなたは劣等種族です。管理者として、展示物を損傷する可能性のある者は入場を拒否する義務があります」
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron holds out a hand with a staff clutched in it in front of him, more warning than threatening.{/n} "Visitor, you are of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to bar entry to any who might damage the exhibits."

traits.locale_text:
ネクロンの前に杖を握った手は、脅威よりも警告を表している。
「訪問者、あなたは劣等種族です。管理者として、展示物を損傷する可能性のある者は入場を拒否する義務があります。」

languages.text: {n}El Necrón extiende una mano con un báculo, con gesto de advertencia más que de amenaza.{/n} «Visitante, perteneces a una raza inferior. Como guardián, es mi deber impedir la entrada de cualquiera que pueda dañar la exposición».
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron holds out a hand with a staff clutched in it in front of him, more warning than threatening.{/n} "Visitor, you are of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to bar entry to any who might damage the exhibits."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Necrón extiende una mano con un báculo, con gesto de advertencia más que de amenaza.{/n} «Visitante, perteneces a una raza inferior. Como guardián, es mi deber impedir la entrada de cualquiera que pueda dañar la exposición».

languages.text: {n}太空死灵向前伸出握着权杖的手，姿态警告多于威胁。{/n}“访客，你属于低等种族。身为看守者，我的职责便是阻拦任何可能损毁展品的人入内。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron holds out a hand with a staff clutched in it in front of him, more warning than threatening.{/n} "Visitor, you are of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to bar entry to any who might damage the exhibits."

traits.locale_text: {n}太空死灵向前伸出握着权杖的手，姿态警告多于威胁。{/n}“访客，你属于低等种族。身为看守者，我的职责便是阻拦任何可能损毁展品的人入内。”

languages.text: {n}Der Necron richtet mehr als Warnung, denn als Drohung einen Stab auf dich.{/n} "{mf|Besucher|Besucherin}, Ihr gehört einem niederen Volk an. Als Wächter ist es meine Pflicht, niemanden einzulassen, der die Exponate beschädigen könnte."
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron holds out a hand with a staff clutched in it in front of him, more warning than threatening.{/n} "Visitor, you are of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to bar entry to any who might damage the exhibits."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Necron richtet mehr als Warnung, denn als Drohung einen Stab auf dich.{/n} "{mf|Besucher|Besucherin}, Ihr gehört einem niederen Volk an. Als Wächter ist es meine Pflicht, niemanden einzulassen, der die Exponate beschädigen könnte."

languages.text: {n}Nekron; elinde asa tuttuğu kolunu, tehdit etmekten çok uyarır gibi önüne uzatıyor.{/n} "Ziyaretçi, aşağı bir ırka mensupsun. Muhafız olarak görevim, sergilenen parçalara zarar verebilecek herkesin girişini engellemektir."
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron holds out a hand with a staff clutched in it in front of him, more warning than threatening.{/n} "Visitor, you are of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to bar entry to any who might damage the exhibits."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nekron; elinde asa tuttuğu kolunu, tehdit etmekten çok uyarır gibi önüne uzatıyor.{/n} "Ziyaretçi, aşağı bir ırka mensupsun. Muhafız olarak görevim, sergilenen parçalara zarar verebilecek herkesin girişini engellemektir."

languages.text: {n}Le Nécron tend devant lui une main tenant un bâton, plus en guise d'avertissement que de menace.{/n} « {mf|Visiteur|Visiteuse}, vous appartenez à une race inférieure. Il est de mon devoir de gardien d'empêcher toute personne risquant d'endommager la collection d'accéder à l'exposition. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron holds out a hand with a staff clutched in it in front of him, more warning than threatening.{/n} "Visitor, you are of an inferior race. As Warden, it is my duty to bar entry to any who might damage the exhibits."
